title: pelargonium × concavum
intro: Pelargonium × concavum, also known as Mountain Geranium or Round-leaved Pelargonium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating a range of health issues. The health benefits of Pelargonium × concavum include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, and soothing digestive problems like diarrhea and irritable bowel syndrome. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium × concavum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat colds, flu, and other viral infections.
